title: Passive Voice
description: Describe processes, reports, and formal situations using passive voice. Handle product returns and logistics operations.
descriptionTr: Süreçleri, raporları ve resmi durumları edilgen çatı ile anlat. Ürün iade ve lojistik operasyonlarını yönet.

vocabulary.example: All returns are processed within 48 hours.
vocabulary.extra: The order is being processed right now.

vocabulary.example: These products are manufactured in Germany.
vocabulary.extra: The parts were manufactured last month.

vocabulary.example: The machines are assembled at our factory in Bursa.
vocabulary.extra: 500 units were assembled yesterday.

vocabulary.example: Every shipment is inspected before delivery.
vocabulary.extra: The warehouse was inspected by the quality team.

vocabulary.example: The refund was approved by the manager.
vocabulary.extra: Your request will be approved within 24 hours.

vocabulary.example: The claim was rejected due to missing documents.
vocabulary.extra: Damaged goods are rejected at the warehouse.

vocabulary.example: Your order will be shipped tomorrow.
vocabulary.extra: The goods were shipped from Istanbul.

vocabulary.example: The package was delivered to the wrong address.
vocabulary.extra: All orders are delivered within 3-5 business days.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tüm siparişler 3-5 iş günü içinde teslim edilir.

vocabulary.example: The product can be returned within 14 days.
vocabulary.extra: Over 200 items were returned last month.
vocabulary.extraTr: Geçen ay 200'den fazla ürün iade edildi.

vocabulary.example: The screen was damaged during shipping.
vocabulary.extra: Damaged items are replaced free of charge.

vocabulary.example: A manufacturing defect was found in the batch.
vocabulary.extra: Products with defects are recalled immediately.

vocabulary.example: This product is covered by a 2-year warranty.
vocabulary.extra: The warranty was voided because of misuse.
vocabulary.extraTr: Yanlış kullanım nedeniyle garanti geçersiz sayıldı.

vocabulary.example: The insurance claim was filed yesterday.
vocabulary.extra: All claims are reviewed by the legal department.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tüm talepler hukuk departmanı tarafından incelenir.

vocabulary.example: The incident is being investigated by our team.
vocabulary.extra: The complaint was investigated and resolved.

vocabulary.example: The issue will be resolved by Friday.
vocabulary.extra: Most complaints are resolved within 48 hours.

vocabulary.example: The customer was compensated for the delay.
vocabulary.extra: You will be compensated with a full refund.

vocabulary.example: You will be notified by email when your order ships.
vocabulary.extra: The team was notified about the issue.

vocabulary.example: Every step must be documented for compliance.
vocabulary.extra: The damage was documented with photos.

vocabulary.example: The return was authorized by the supervisor.
vocabulary.extra: Only managers are authorized to approve refunds.
vocabulary.extraTr: Sadece müdürler iadeleri onaylama yetkisine sahiptir.

vocabulary.example: The replacement was dispatched this morning.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yedek ürün bu sabah sevk edildi.
vocabulary.extra: Orders are dispatched from our central warehouse.

vocabulary.example: Every package is scanned at each checkpoint.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Her paket her kontrol noktasında taranır.
vocabulary.extra: The barcode was scanned but showed an error.

vocabulary.example: Your identity will be verified before the refund.
vocabulary.extra: The shipment details were verified by the team.

vocabulary.example: The complaint was registered in our system.
vocabulary.extra: All returns must be registered online first.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tüm iadeler önce online olarak kaydedilmelidir.

vocabulary.example: A case number was assigned to your request.
vocabulary.extra: The task was assigned to the logistics team.

vocabulary.example: The investigation was completed yesterday.
vocabulary.extra: All orders are completed within the deadline.

vocabulary.example: Customer complaints are handled by our support team.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Müşteri şikayetleri destek ekibimiz tarafından ele alınır.
vocabulary.extra: The situation was handled professionally.

vocabulary.example: The issue was escalated to senior management.
vocabulary.extra: Unresolved complaints are escalated automatically.
vocabulary.extraTr: Çözülmeyen şikayetler otomatik olarak üst makama iletilir.

vocabulary.example: Your application is being reviewed.
vocabulary.extra: The contract was reviewed by our legal team.

vocabulary.example: You will be updated on the status of your claim.
vocabulary.extra: The tracking system was updated last night.

vocabulary.example: Completed cases are archived after 90 days.
vocabulary.extra: All documents must be archived for audit purposes.

grammar.title: Passive Voice — Present, Past & Future
grammar.titleTr: Edilgen Çatı — Şimdiki, Geçmiş ve Gelecek Zaman
grammar.explanation: Passive voice is used when the action is more important than who does it. Structure: Subject + be + past participle (+ by agent). Common in business, logistics, and formal communication.
grammar.explanationTr: Edilgen çatı, eylemin kimin yaptığından daha önemli olduğu durumlarda kullanılır. Yapı: Özne + be + geçmiş ortaç (+ tarafından). İş, lojistik ve resmi iletişimde yaygındır.
table: Present: The order is processed daily.
The order is not processed on weekends.
Is the order processed today?
Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
Present Continuous: The package is being delivered now.
The package is not being delivered yet.
Is the package being delivered?
Yes, it is.
Past: The complaint was resolved yesterday.
The complaint was not resolved on time.
Was the complaint resolved?
Yes, it was. / No, it wasn't.
Past: The goods were shipped from Istanbul.
The goods were not shipped last week.
Were the goods shipped?
Yes, they were.
Future: The refund will be processed tomorrow.
The refund will not be processed today.
Will the refund be processed?
Yes, it will.
Modal: The issue can be resolved quickly.
The issue cannot be ignored.
Can the issue be resolved?
Yes, it can.
Present Perfect: The report has been completed.
The report has not been reviewed yet.
Has the report been completed?
Yes, it has.

tips.en: Active: 'The team inspected the goods.' → Passive: 'The goods were inspected (by the team).'
tips.tr: Etken: 'Ekip malları denetledi.' → Edilgen: 'Mallar (ekip tarafından) denetlendi.'

tips.en: Use passive when WHO did it doesn't matter: 'The package was delivered.' (we don't care by whom)
tips.tr: KİM yaptığı önemli değilse edilgen kullan: 'Paket teslim edildi.' (kim teslim etti önemli değil)

tips.en: Business emails love passive: 'Your request has been received' sounds more professional
tips.tr: İş e-postaları edilgen sever: 'Talebiniz alındı' daha profesyonel görünür

tips.en: 'by + agent' is optional: 'The report was written (by the manager).'
tips.tr: 'by + yapan kişi' isteğe bağlıdır: 'Rapor (müdür tarafından) yazıldı.'

tips.en: Common in logistics: shipped, delivered, processed, inspected, approved, dispatched
tips.tr: Lojistikte yaygın: sevk edildi, teslim edildi, işlendi, denetlendi, onaylandı, yollandı

tips.en: Don't overuse passive — mix with active for natural writing
tips.tr: Edilgeni aşırı kullanma — doğal yazı için etkenle karıştır

reading.text:
RETURN POLICY — GlobalShip Logistics

All products purchased through our platform can be returned within 14 days of delivery. Returns must be registered online before the item is sent back.

How the process works:
1. A return request is submitted through your account.
2. The request is reviewed by our team within 24 hours.
3. A return label is generated and sent to your email.
4. The item must be packed in its original packaging.
5. The package is picked up by our courier or dropped off at a collection point.
6. Once received, the item is inspected for damage.
7. If approved, your refund is processed within 3-5 business days.

Please note: Items that were used, damaged by the customer, or returned without original packaging will not be accepted. Electronics must be returned with all accessories included.

---

Customer Email:
"Dear Support, I ordered a laptop (Order #4821) and it was delivered on March 15th. Unfortunately, the screen was cracked when the box was opened. The damage was clearly caused during shipping. I would like this to be investigated and a replacement to be sent as soon as possible. Photos of the damage have been attached."
reading.textTr:
İADE POLİTİKASI — GlobalShip Lojistik

Platformumuz üzerinden satın alınan tüm ürünler teslimat tarihinden itibaren 14 gün içinde iade edilebilir. İadeler, ürün geri gönderilmeden önce online olarak kaydedilmelidir.

Süreç nasıl işliyor:
1. Hesabınız üzerinden iade talebi gönderilir.
2. Talep ekibimiz tarafından 24 saat içinde incelenir.
3. İade etiketi oluşturulur ve e-postanıza gönderilir.
4. Ürün orijinal ambalajında paketlenmelidir.
5. Paket kuryemiz tarafından alınır veya toplama noktasına bırakılır.
6. Alındıktan sonra ürün hasar açısından denetlenir.
7. Onaylanırsa iadeniz 3-5 iş günü içinde işlenir.

Not: Kullanılmış, müşteri tarafından hasar görmüş veya orijinal ambalajı olmadan iade edilen ürünler kabul edilmez. Elektronik ürünler tüm aksesuarlarıyla birlikte iade edilmelidir.

---

Müşteri E-postası:
"Sayın Destek, bir dizüstü bilgisayar sipariş ettim (Sipariş #4821) ve 15 Mart'ta teslim edildi. Maalesef kutu açıldığında ekran çatlakmış. Hasarın sevkiyat sırasında oluştuğu açıkça belli. Bu durumun araştırılmasını ve en kısa sürede yedek ürün gönderilmesini istiyorum. Hasar fotoğrafları ek olarak gönderildi."

questions.question: How long do customers have to return a product?
questions.questionTr: Müşterilerin ürünü iade etmek için ne kadar süreleri var?

questions.question: What happens after the return request is submitted?
questions.questionTr: İade talebi gönderildikten sonra ne olur?

questions.question: What was wrong with the customer's laptop?
questions.questionTr: Müşterinin dizüstü bilgisayarında ne sorun vardı?

questions.question: When was the laptop delivered?
questions.questionTr: Dizüstü bilgisayar ne zaman teslim edildi?

questions.question: What will NOT be accepted for return?

The complaint ___ being investigated right now.

The return was ___ by the supervisor.
You will be ___ by email when it ships.
The issue was ___ to senior management.

The report has been ___ by the legal team.

multipleChoice.question: "Active: The team inspected the goods." Passive?
options: The goods inspected by the team.
The goods were inspected by the team.
The goods is inspected by the team.
The goods inspecting by the team.

multipleChoice.question: "The package is being ___" (şu an teslim ediliyor)

sentenceOrder.correct: All returns are processed within 48 hours
The refund will be approved by Friday
The complaint was investigated by the team
The goods were inspected at the warehouse

acceptAlso: All returns are processed in 48 hours

acceptAlso: The issue is being investigated by the team

acceptAlso: The package is scanned at every checkpoint

dialog.title: Handling a Product Return
dialog.context: Eyüp, GlobalShip'te lojistik müdürü. Ekip üyesi Murat ile bir müşteri şikayetini görüşüyor, sonra müşteriyi (Mrs. Taylor) arıyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, we have a problem. A damaged laptop was reported by a customer — Order #4821.
lines.textTr: Eyüp, bir sorunumuz var. Bir müşteri hasarlı dizüstü bilgisayar bildirdi — Sipariş #4821.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: It was delivered on March 15th. The customer says the screen was cracked when the box was opened.
lines.textTr: 15 Mart'ta teslim edildi. Müşteri kutu açıldığında ekranın çatlak olduğunu söylüyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Was it inspected before shipping? Every item should be inspected at the warehouse.
lines.textTr: Sevkiyattan önce denetlendi mi? Her ürün depoda denetlenmelidir.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, it was inspected and approved. The damage must have been caused during transit.
lines.textTr: Evet, denetlendi ve onaylandı. Hasar taşıma sırasında oluşmuş olmalı.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Okay. Has a case number been assigned yet?
lines.textTr: Tamam. Bir vaka numarası atandı mı?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, Case #RT-2847 was registered in the system this morning. Photos have been attached by the customer.
lines.textTr: Evet, Vaka #RT-2847 bu sabah sisteme kaydedildi. Müşteri tarafından fotoğraflar eklendi.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Good. A replacement should be dispatched immediately. And the customer needs to be notified. Let me call her.
lines.textTr: İyi. Yedek ürün derhal sevk edilmeli. Ve müşterinin bilgilendirilmesi lazım. Onu arayayım.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hello, Mrs. Taylor? This is Eyüp from GlobalShip. I'm calling about your damaged laptop — Case #RT-2847.
lines.textTr: Merhaba, Bayan Taylor? Ben GlobalShip'ten Eyüp. Hasarlı dizüstü bilgisayarınız hakkında arıyorum — Vaka #RT-2847.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes! I've been waiting for a response. The screen was completely cracked. It was obviously damaged during shipping.
lines.textTr: Evet! Cevap bekliyordum. Ekran tamamen çatlamıştı. Belli ki sevkiyat sırasında hasar görmüş.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I sincerely apologize, Mrs. Taylor. The issue has been investigated, and we've confirmed the damage was caused during transit.
lines.textTr: İçtenlikle özür dilerim Bayan Taylor. Sorun araştırıldı ve hasarın taşıma sırasında oluştuğu doğrulandı.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: So what will be done about it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: A brand new replacement has been authorized and will be dispatched today. It should be delivered within 2-3 business days. The damaged unit will be picked up by our courier.
lines.textTr: Yepyeni bir yedek ürün yetkilendirildi ve bugün sevk edilecek. 2-3 iş günü içinde teslim edilecek. Hasarlı ürün kuryemiz tarafından alınacak.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That sounds good. Will I be compensated for the inconvenience?
lines.textTr: İyi görünüyor. Yaşanan rahatsızlık için tazmin edilecek miyim?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Absolutely. A 15% discount code has been generated for your next order. You'll be notified by email with all the details.
lines.textTr: Kesinlikle. Bir sonraki siparişiniz için %15 indirim kodu oluşturuldu. Tüm detaylarla e-postayla bilgilendirileceksiniz.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you, Eyüp. I appreciate how quickly this was handled.
lines.textTr: Teşekkür ederim Eyüp. Bunun ne kadar hızlı ele alındığını takdir ediyorum.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: You're welcome, Mrs. Taylor. We take these issues very seriously. Everything has been documented in your case file.
lines.textTr: Rica ederim Bayan Taylor. Bu konuları çok ciddiye alıyoruz. Her şey vaka dosyanızda belgelendi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great. I look forward to receiving the replacement.
lines.textTr: Harika. Yedek ürünü almayı dört gözle bekliyorum.

questions.question: What was wrong with the customer's order?
What will be done for the customer?
How soon will the replacement be delivered?
questions.questionTr: Yedek ürün ne zaman teslim edilecek?

resources.title: Passive Voice Exercises — Perfect English Grammar
